params.prompt: Mobile game activity panel UI, portrait 9:16, rendered in the EXACT visual style of the reference screenshots (X3 game UI: dark ornate panels, gold metallic borders, item quality frames, golden title banner, semi-realistic game rendering, NOT painterly). Theme: a 'Hero Growth Handbook' daily-login activity with TWO purchasable versions. Top-to-bottom layout: (1) top banner showing the title 'Hero Growth Handbook' with heroic fantasy hero key art on the left and a countdown timer chip; (2) NEW two-tab selector bar directly above the reward area, two side-by-side tabs: LEFT tab labeled 'Standard $29.99', RIGHT tab labeled 'Deluxe $49.99' with a small '2.0x' corner badge; the currently-selected tab highlighted with a glowing gold underline; (3) a vertical grid of 30 daily reward cells in gold quality frames, each cell with a reward item icon and a 'Day N' label, same frame style as the reference; (4) the Day 30 cell is a SINGLE FULL-WIDTH 'Full-Attendance Grand Prize' wide cell with luxurious gold-and-purple coloring and glowing light burst effect, clearly emphasized like a finale reward; (5) a gold purchase button at the bottom showing the active version's price. Deluxe premium gold/purple luxury feel. Preserve authentic X3 UI design language: gold outlines, dark wood/metal panels, quality frames, glowing accents. Strictly NO painterly or brush-stroke look, NO football/sports/national/flag elements. Clean production-ready game UI with clearly separable component slots (tab bar, reward cells, wide finale cell, purchase button).
